entity-table.description: Data table with columns and sorting

data.description: Data array provided by the trait via render-ui

fields.description: Fields to display - accepts string[] or Column[] for unified interface. Alias for columns

columns.description: Columns can be Column objects or simple string field names. String elements must resolve to fields on the linked entity.

itemActions.description: Item actions from generated code - maps to rowActions

data.description: Data array provided by the trait via render-ui

fields.description: Fields to display - accepts string[] or {key, header}[] for unified interface

entity-cards.description: Grid of cards for visual content

data.description: Data array provided by the trait via render-ui

alignItems.description: Align cards vertically in their cells

children.description: Children elements (cards) - optional when using entity prop

fields.description: Fields to display - required for schema-driven rendering

variant.description: Visual variant for the card grid

imageField.description: Entity field name containing an image URL to display as card thumbnail

data.description: Data array provided by the trait via render-ui

actions.description: Unified actions array - first action with variant='primary' is the main action

fields.description: Fields to display - accepts string[], {key, header}[], or DetailField[]

initialData.description: Initial data for edit mode (passed by compiler)

page-header.description: Page title with optional breadcrumb and action buttons

title.description: Page title - accepts unknown to handle generated code accessing dynamic entity data

backEvent.description: Event to emit when back is clicked (default: BACK)

actions.description: Actions array - first action with variant='primary' (or first action) is the main action

form.description: Complete form with fields and actions

onSubmit.description: Submit event name for trait dispatch (emitted via eventBus as UI:{onSubmit})

onCancel.description: Cancel event name for trait dispatch (emitted via eventBus as UI:{onCancel})

mode.description: Form mode — 'create' for new records, 'edit' for updating existing. Accepts `string` so schema-driven callers (whose `config.mode` is typed as `string` per the trait's declared config block) compile cleanly. The runtime treats anything other than 'edit' as 'create'.

fields.description: Fields definition (schema format) - accepts readonly for generated const arrays

cancelLabel.description: Cancel button label (if provided, shows cancel button)

showCancel.description: Show cancel button (defaults to true for schema forms)

title.description: Form title (used by ModalSlot to extract title)

submitEvent.description: Event dispatch props (for trait state machine integration)

cancelEvent.description: Event to dispatch on cancel (defaults to 'CANCEL')

relationsLoading.description: Loading state for relation data: { fieldName: boolean }

hiddenCalculations.description: Hidden calculations that emit GLOBAL_VARIABLE_SET on field change (boolean true means enabled but config loaded separately)

violationTriggers.description: Violation conditions that emit VIOLATION_DETECTED when met (boolean true means enabled but config loaded separately)

evaluationContext.description: Context for S-expression evaluation - accepts flexible types from generated code

sections.description: Nested form sections with optional conditions

onFieldChange.description: Callback when any field value changes

repeatable.description: Whether the form supports repeatable entries

form-section.description: Alias for form — Complete form with fields and actions

onSubmit.description: Submit event name for trait dispatch (emitted via eventBus as UI:{onSubmit})

onCancel.description: Cancel event name for trait dispatch (emitted via eventBus as UI:{onCancel})

mode.description: Form mode — 'create' for new records, 'edit' for updating existing. Accepts `string` so schema-driven callers (whose `config.mode` is typed as `string` per the trait's declared config block) compile cleanly. The runtime treats anything other than 'edit' as 'create'.

fields.description: Fields definition (schema format) - accepts readonly for generated const arrays

cancelLabel.description: Cancel button label (if provided, shows cancel button)

showCancel.description: Show cancel button (defaults to true for schema forms)

title.description: Form title (used by ModalSlot to extract title)

submitEvent.description: Event dispatch props (for trait state machine integration)

cancelEvent.description: Event to dispatch on cancel (defaults to 'CANCEL')

relationsLoading.description: Loading state for relation data: { fieldName: boolean }

hiddenCalculations.description: Hidden calculations that emit GLOBAL_VARIABLE_SET on field change (boolean true means enabled but config loaded separately)

violationTriggers.description: Violation conditions that emit VIOLATION_DETECTED when met (boolean true means enabled but config loaded separately)

evaluationContext.description: Context for S-expression evaluation - accepts flexible types from generated code

sections.description: Nested form sections with optional conditions

onFieldChange.description: Callback when any field value changes

repeatable.description: Whether the form supports repeatable entries

event.description: Event name to dispatch on search (schema metadata, wired by trait) This is metadata used by the trait generator, not by the component.

entity.description: Entity type for context-aware search. When provided, search events include entity context.

query.description: Query singleton binding for state management. When provided, syncs search state with the query singleton. Example: "@TaskQuery"

onFilterChange.description: Callback when a filter changes - for EntityStore integration

query.description: Query singleton binding for state management. When provided, syncs filter state with the query singleton. Example: "@TaskQuery"

tabs.description: Tab items (alias for items - used by generated code)

tabChangeEvent.description: Declarative tab change event — emits UI:{tabChangeEvent} with { tabId }

maxItems.description: Maximum items to show (truncates with ellipsis)

steps.description: Step definitions (compatible with WizardContainer's WizardStep). A string is shorthand for `{ id: str, title: str }`.

onStepClick.description: Callback when a completed step is clicked

allowNavigation.description: Allow clicking on completed steps to navigate back

stepClickEvent.description: Declarative step click event — emits UI:{stepClickEvent} with { stepIndex }

isValid.description: Whether the current step is valid (enables Next/Complete)

showComplete.description: Show the Complete button (on last step)

onBack.description: Event to emit on Back click

onNext.description: Event to emit on Next click

onComplete.description: Event to emit on Complete click

onBackClick.description: Direct callback for Back (alternative to event)

onNextClick.description: Direct callback for Next (alternative to event)

onCompleteClick.description: Direct callback for Complete (alternative to event)

currentStep.description: Current step index (controlled) - accepts unknown for generated code compatibility

onPageChange.description: Callback when page changes (optional - can be a no-op if not interactive)

showJumpToPage.description: Show jump to page input @default false

maxVisiblePages.description: Maximum number of page buttons to show @default 7

pageChangeEvent.description: Declarative page change event — emits UI:{pageChangeEvent} with { page }

pageSizeChangeEvent.description: Declarative page size change event — emits UI:{pageSizeChangeEvent} with { pageSize }

icon.description: Icon to display. Accepts either: - A Lucide icon component (LucideIcon) - A string icon name (e.g., "check-circle", "x-circle")

title.description: Primary text to display - use title or message (message is alias for backwards compat)

message.description: Alias for title - used by schema patterns

actionEvent.description: Declarative action event — emits UI:{actionEvent} via eventBus when action button is clicked

retryEvent.description: Declarative retry event — emits UI:{retryEvent} via eventBus when retry button is clicked

duration.description: Auto-dismiss duration in milliseconds (0 = no auto-dismiss)

dismissEvent.description: Declarative dismiss event — emits UI:{dismissEvent} via eventBus when toast is dismissed

actionEvent.description: Declarative action event — emits UI:{actionEvent} via eventBus when action button is clicked

value.description: The stat value to display prominently

dashboard-grid.description: Multi-column grid for widgets and stats cards

data.description: Data array provided by the trait via render-ui

isOpen.description: Whether the modal is open (defaults to true when rendered by slot wrapper)

onClose.description: Callback when modal should close (injected by slot wrapper)

children.description: Modal content (can be empty if using slot content)

closeEvent.description: Declarative close event — emits UI:{closeEvent} via eventBus when modal should close

swipeDownToClose.description: Enable swipe-down-to-close on mobile bottom sheet (default: true)

isOpen.description: Whether the drawer is open (defaults to true when rendered by slot wrapper)

onClose.description: Callback when drawer should close (injected by slot wrapper)

children.description: Drawer content (can be empty if using slot content)

closeEvent.description: Declarative close event — emits UI:{closeEvent} via eventBus when drawer should close

isOpen.description: Whether the dialog is open (defaults to true when rendered by slot wrapper)

onClose.description: Callback when dialog is closed (injected by slot wrapper)

onConfirm.description: Callback when action is confirmed (injected by slot wrapper)

master-detail.description: List on left, selected item detail on right

emptyDetail.description: Content shown when nothing is selected

hasSelection.description: Whether an item is currently selected

box.description: Generic styled container with padding, borders, and backgrounds

action.description: Declarative event name — emits UI:{action} via eventBus on click

actionPayload.description: Payload to include with the action event

hoverEvent.description: Declarative hover event — emits UI:{hoverEvent} with { hovered: true/false } on mouseEnter/mouseLeave

grid.description: CSS Grid layout for multi-column content

cols.description: Number of columns (can be responsive object)

inline.description: Center inline (width fits content) vs block (full width)

spacer.description: Flexible space that expands to fill available room

label.description: Text label to display in the divider

game-hud.description: Heads-up display showing health, score, lives

stats.description: Stats to display - accepts readonly for compatibility with generated const arrays

elements.description: Schema-style elements array (alternative to stats). Converted to stats internally for backwards compatibility.

transparent.description: Whether to use a semi-transparent background

game-menu.description: Main menu with start, options, credits

options.description: Menu options - accepts readonly for compatibility with generated const arrays

onSelect.description: Called when an option is selected (legacy callback, prefer event bus)

eventBus.description: Event bus for emitting UI events (optional, uses hook if not provided)

game-over-screen.description: Game over screen with score and retry option

onAction.description: Called when an action is selected (legacy callback, prefer event bus)

eventBus.description: Event bus for emitting UI events (optional, uses hook if not provided)

highScore.description: High score (optional, shows "NEW HIGH SCORE!" if exceeded)

currentScore.description: Current score for high score comparison (accepts string for schema bindings)

inventory-panel.description: Grid-based inventory UI for items, equipment, or resources

onSelectSlot.description: Called when a slot is selected

onUseItem.description: Called when an item is used (double-click or Enter)

onDropItem.description: Called when an item is dropped

selectSlotEvent.description: Declarative event: emits UI:{selectSlotEvent} with { index } when a slot is selected

useItemEvent.description: Declarative event: emits UI:{useItemEvent} with { item: InventoryItem } when an item is used

dropItemEvent.description: Declarative event: emits UI:{dropItemEvent} with { item: InventoryItem } when an item is dropped

dialogue-box.description: RPG-style dialogue box with speaker, portrait, and choices

typewriterSpeed.description: Typewriter speed in ms per character (0 = instant)

onChoice.description: Called when a choice is selected

onAdvance.description: Called when dialogue is advanced (no choices)

completeEvent.description: Declarative event: emits UI:{completeEvent} when text animation completes

choiceEvent.description: Declarative event: emits UI:{choiceEvent} with { choice: DialogueChoice } when a choice is selected

advanceEvent.description: Declarative event: emits UI:{advanceEvent} when dialogue is advanced

runtime-debugger.description: Debug overlay showing FPS, entity states, event logs

mode.description: Display mode: floating (fixed overlay), inline (block element), or verify (always-visible compact overlay for verification runs)

schema.description: Raw schema for EventDispatcherTab payload extraction

leftIcon.description: Left icon as ReactNode, Lucide component, or string name (e.g. "plus", "trash")

rightIcon.description: Right icon as ReactNode, Lucide component, or string name

action.description: Declarative event name — emits UI:{action} via eventBus on click

actionPayload.description: Payload to include with the action event

label.description: Button label text (alternative to children for schema-driven rendering)

badge.description: Small label for status or count

amount.description: Numeric count or amount to display in badge

label.description: Badge label text (alternative to children for schema-driven rendering)

icon.description: Icon name (Lucide icon string) or React node

name.description: Full name - initials will be generated automatically

initials.description: Initials to display (e.g., "JD" for John Doe) If not provided but name is, initials will be auto-generated

icon.description: Icon to display when no image or initials

action.description: Declarative event name — emits UI:{action} via eventBus on click

actionPayload.description: Payload to include with the action event

icon.description: Lucide icon component (preferred for type-safe usage)

name.description: Icon name as string (resolved from iconMap)

color.description: Color class (Tailwind color class) or 'inherit' for theme default

strokeWidth.description: Icon stroke width - uses theme default if not specified

card.description: Card container with optional header and footer

title.description: Card title - renders in header if provided

progressType.description: Type of the progress bar (linear, circular, stepped) @default 'linear'

action.description: Declarative event name for trait dispatch

inputType.description: Input type - supports 'select' and 'textarea' in addition to standard types

icon.description: Lucide icon component for left side (convenience prop)

clearable.description: Show clear button when input has value

onClear.description: Callback when clear button is clicked

onChange.description: onChange handler - accepts events from input, select, or textarea

action.description: Declarative event name for trait dispatch
Declarative event name for trait dispatch

options.description: Radio options (string array or SelectOption array)

action.description: Declarative event name for trait dispatch

label.description: Label text displayed next to the radio button

helperText.description: Helper text displayed below the radio button

error.description: Error message displayed below the radio button

dismissEvent.description: Declarative dismiss event — emits UI:{dismissEvent} via eventBus when alert is dismissed

children.description: Tooltip trigger element (ReactElement or ReactNode that will be wrapped in span)
Popover trigger element (ReactElement or ReactNode that will be wrapped in span)

multiple.description: Allow multiple items open at once @default false

defaultOpen.description: Default open items by index (pattern compatibility)

toggleEvent.description: Declarative toggle event — emits UI:{toggleEvent} with { itemId, isOpen }

simple-grid.description: Simple responsive grid with auto columns

repeatable-form-section.description: Repeatable form section for multiple entries

currentState.description: Current inspection state (used when trackAddedInState is true)

conditional-wrapper.description: ConditionalWrapper Atom Component  A wrapper component that conditionally renders its children based on S-expression evaluation. Used for dynamic field visibility in inspection forms.

children.description: Children to render when condition is true (or when no condition is provided)

fallback.description: Optional fallback to render when condition is false

animate.description: Whether to animate the transition (uses CSS transitions)

law-reference-tooltip.description: LawReferenceTooltip Atom Component  A specialized tooltip for displaying law references in inspection forms. Shows law name, article number, and relevant clause text.

children.description: Children element that triggers the tooltip

overlay.description: Overlay Atom Component  A fixed backdrop for modals and drawers.

action.description: Declarative event name — emits UI:{action} via eventBus on click

stack.description: Stack Component  A layout primitive for arranging children in a vertical or horizontal stack with consistent spacing. Includes convenience exports VStack and HStack for common use cases.

align.description: Align items on the cross axis

justify.description: Justify items on the main axis

action.description: Declarative event name — emits UI:{action} via eventBus on click

actionPayload.description: Payload to include with the action event

responsive.description: When true, horizontal stacks flip to vertical below the md breakpoint (768px)

text-highlight.description: TextHighlight Atom Component  A styled span component for highlighting text with annotations (questions or notes). Uses different colors for different annotation types: - Questions: Blue highlight - Notes: Yellow highlight

isActive.description: Whether the highlight is currently active/focused @default false

action.description: Declarative event name — emits UI:{action} via eventBus on click

hoverEvent.description: Declarative hover event — emits UI:{hoverEvent} with { hovered: true/false }

theme-toggle.description: ThemeToggle Atom Component  A button that toggles between light and dark themes. Uses Sun and Moon icons to indicate current/target theme.

typography.description: Typography Atom Component  Text elements following the KFlow design system with theme-aware styling.

level.description: Heading level (1-6) - alternative to variant for headings

pressEvent.description: Declarative event name emitted on press via useEventBus

releaseEvent.description: Declarative event name emitted on release via useEventBus

pressed.description: Whether the button is currently pressed

sprite.description: Sprite Component  Renders a single frame from a spritesheet with transform support.

frameWidth.description: Width of each frame in pixels

frameHeight.description: Height of each frame in pixels

frame.description: Frame index to display (0-based, left-to-right, top-to-bottom)

columns.description: Number of columns in spritesheet (for frame calculation)

action.description: Declarative event name emitted on click via useEventBus

form-actions.description: ButtonGroup Molecule Component  A component for grouping buttons together with connected styling. Supports both children-based and form-actions pattern (primary/secondary) usage. Uses Button atoms.

children.description: Button group content (Button components) - use this OR primary/secondary

primary.description: Primary action button config (for form-actions pattern) Accepts Readonly for compatibility with generated const objects

secondary.description: Secondary action buttons config (for form-actions pattern) Accepts readonly array for compatibility with generated const arrays

entity.description: Entity type for filter-group pattern (schema metadata)

flex.description: Flex Component  A flexbox wrapper with all common flex properties exposed as props. More explicit than Stack for when you need full flex control.

floating-action-button.description: FloatingActionButton Molecule Component  A floating action button that can expand into multiple actions vertically. Uses Button atom.

action.description: Declarative event name. When set, clicking the FAB emits `UI:{action}` via the event bus and (if also provided) calls `onClick`. Mirrors the Button atom's `action` prop so schemas can write `{ type: "floating-action-button", action: "INIT" }` uniformly.

actionPayload.description: Payload to include with the dispatched action event.

actions.description: Multiple actions. When provided, the button expands to show all of them.

icon.description: Icon name (resolves to a Lucide icon by PascalCase / kebab-case lookup).

onClick.description: Optional direct click handler. Runs after the action emit when both are present.

label.description: Optional label shown via `aria-label` (visually hidden in single-action mode; rendered as a tooltip beside expanded actions in multi-action mode).

form-field.description: FormField Molecule Component  A form field wrapper with label, hint, and error message support. **Atomic Design**: Composed using Label and Typography atoms.

form-section-header.description: FormSectionHeader  Header component for collapsible form sections. Provides consistent styling and interaction for section headers.

icon.description: Icon name to show before title

input-group.description: InputGroup Molecule Component  A component for grouping input with addons (icons, buttons, text). Uses Input, Button, Icon, and Typography atoms.

relation-select.description: RelationSelect Molecule Component  A searchable select component for relation fields. Allows users to search and select from related entities.  Composed from: Box, HStack, VStack, Input, Button, Spinner, Typography atoms

options.description: Available options - accepts readonly for compatibility with generated const arrays

side-panel.description: SidePanel Molecule Component  A side panel that slides in from the right (or left) with header and content. Uses Button, Typography atoms.

closeEvent.description: Declarative close event — emits UI:{closeEvent} via eventBus when panel should close

violation-alert.description: ViolationAlert  Displays inspection violations with law references and action types. Used in inspection forms to show detected compliance violations.  Action Types: - measure: Corrective measure required (warning) - admin: Administrative action (error) - penalty: Penalty proceedings (error, severe)

severity.description: Visual severity (derived from actionType if not specified)

onNavigateToField.description: Navigate to the field that caused violation

onAction.description: Called when a button is pressed/released

actionEvent.description: Declarative event name emitted on action via useEventBus

onDirection.description: Called when a direction is pressed/released

directionEvent.description: Declarative event name emitted on direction press/release via useEventBus

value.description: Current value (defaults to 0 if not provided)

source.description: Data source entity name (for schema config)

field.description: Field name in the source (for schema config)

button-pattern.description: Component Pattern Wrappers  Pattern wrappers for atomic UI components that can be rendered via render_ui. These bridge the shell's atomic components with the pattern system.  Interactive components emit events via useEventBus for the closed circuit pattern.

onClick.description: Legacy alias for {@link ButtonProps.action} (string event name).

iconPosition.description: Icon placement — maps to Button's `icon` (left) or `iconRight` (right).

custom-pattern.description: CustomPattern Component  Renders freeform HTML elements with Tailwind classes for custom UI designs. Supports nested children and the closed circuit pattern (action prop for events).

token.description: Token path(s) for design token resolution

action.description: Event to emit on click (REQUIRED for interactive elements)

drawer-slot.description: DrawerSlot Component  Wraps drawer slot content in a proper Drawer component. Used by trait-driven pages to display drawer UI from render_ui effects.  Handles: - Auto-open when content is present - Dispatches CLOSE/CANCEL events when closed - Extracts title from Form or DetailPanel components - Configurable position and size

children.description: Content to display in the drawer

title.description: Override drawer title (extracted from children if not provided)

header.description: Header Organism Component  A header component for mobile/responsive layouts with menu toggle, brand, and user avatar. Styled to match the main Layout component's mobile header.

onUserClick.description: Callback when user avatar is clicked

variant.description: Variant - mobile shows menu toggle, desktop shows full nav @default 'mobile'

entity.description: Entity name for schema-driven auto-fetch (closed circuit)

layout-pattern.description: Base props for all layout patterns with children support.

modal-slot.description: ModalSlot Component  Wraps modal slot content in a proper Modal component. Used by trait-driven pages to display modal UI from render_ui effects.  Handles: - Auto-open when content is present - Dispatches CLOSE/CANCEL events when closed - Extracts title from Form components

children.description: Content to display in the modal

title.description: Override modal title (extracted from children if not provided)

navigation.description: Navigation Organism Component  A navigation component with items, active indicators, icons, and badges. Uses Menu, ButtonGroup molecules and Button, Icon, Badge, Typography, Divider atoms.

orbital-visualization.description: OrbitalVisualization Component  Visualizes KFlow schemas as atomic orbitals based on complexity. Uses CSS 3D transforms for lightweight rendering without Three.js.  Orbital Types (based on complexity score): - 1s (1-3): Simple sphere - Red - 2s (4-8): Larger sphere - Orange - 2p (9-15): Dumbbell shape - Yellow - 3s (16-25): Sphere with node - Green - 3p (26-40): Complex dumbbell - Blue - 3d (41-60): Cloverleaf - Indigo - 4f (61+): Multi-lobe - Violet

section.description: Section Component  A semantic section wrapper with optional title, description, and action. Perfect for grouping related content with consistent spacing.

action.description: Action element (e.g., button, link)

sidebar.description: Sidebar Organism Component  A sidebar component with logo, navigation items, user section, and collapse/expand. Styled to match the main Layout component with theme-aware CSS variables.

logo.description: Logo/Brand content - can be a ReactNode or logo config

collapseChangeEvent.description: Event emitted when collapse state changes, payload: { collapsed: boolean }

closeEvent.description: Event emitted when close button is clicked

logoClickEvent.description: Event emitted when logo/brand is clicked

split.description: Split Component  A two-column layout with configurable ratios. Perfect for sidebar/content layouts or side-by-side comparisons.

ratio.description: Size ratio between left and right panels

stackBreakpoint.description: Breakpoint to switch from stacked to side-by-side

table.description: Table Organism Component  A table component with header row, data rows, pagination, sorting, and filters. Uses Pagination, SearchInput, ButtonGroup, Card, Menu molecules and Button, Icon, Checkbox, Typography, Badge, Divider atoms.

data.description: Data array provided by the trait via render-ui

sortColumn.description: Current sort column (display hint, mapped from sortBy)

toast-slot.description: ToastSlot Component  Wraps toast slot content in a proper Toast component with positioning. Used by trait-driven pages to display toast UI from render_ui effects.  Handles: - Auto-show when content is present - Dispatches DISMISS event when dismissed - Fixed positioning in corner of screen

children.description: Content to display in the toast (message or ReactNode)

duration.description: Auto-dismiss duration in ms (0 = no auto-dismiss)

split-pane.description: SplitPane Component  Two-pane resizable split layout for master-detail views, dual-pane editors, and code + preview layouts.  Uses wireframe theme styling (high contrast, sharp edges).

ratio.description: Initial ratio (0-100, percentage of first pane)

minSize.description: Minimum size of either pane in pixels

tabbed-container.description: TabbedContainer Component  Tabbed content areas with shared header/context. Wraps the Tabs molecule with layout-specific styling.  Uses wireframe theme styling (high contrast, sharp edges).

showBranding.description: Show branding panel on the side

counter-template.description: CounterTemplate  A presentational template for counter/incrementer features. Supports increment, decrement, and reset operations.

entity.description: Entity data, the sole source of runtime state

user.description: Current user info (optional - auto-populated from auth context if not provided)

onSignOut.description: Callback when user clicks sign out (optional - uses auth context signOut if not provided)

children.description: Page content rendered inside the main area

game-template.description: GameTemplate  A presentational template for game applications. Includes a main game canvas/area, HUD overlay, and an optional debug sidebar. **Atomic Design**: Composed using Box, Typography, and Layout molecules/atoms.

entity.description: Entity data, the sole source of runtime state

children.description: The main game canvas or content

showDebugPanel.description: Whether the debug panel is visible

generic-app-template.description: GenericAppTemplate  A simple, generic template for any application. Includes a header with title and actions, and a main content area. **Atomic Design**: Composed using Box, Typography, and Button atoms.

entity.description: Entity data, the sole source of runtime state

game-shell.description: GameShell  A full-screen layout wrapper for game applications. Replaces DashboardLayout for game clients — no sidebar nav, just full-viewport rendering with an optional HUD overlay bar.  Used as a React Router layout route element: <Route element={<GameShell appName="TraitWars" />}> <Route index element={<WorldMapPage />} /> ... </Route>

appName.description: Application / game title shown in the HUD bar

hud.description: Optional HUD content rendered above the main area

className.description: Extra class name on the root container

showTopBar.description: Whether to show the minimal top bar (default: true)

children.description: Game content rendered inside the full-screen area

chart.description: Data visualization chart supporting bar, line, pie, area, and donut types

data.description: Simple data (single series shorthand)

meter.description: Gauge/meter component for displaying a value within a range with thresholds

timeline.description: Vertical timeline for displaying chronological events with status indicators

entity.description: Schema entity data typed against @almadar/core's EntityRow. Items from `entity` are normalised into `items` when `items` is omitted. UI-specific TimelineItem fields (`icon`, callbacks) cannot round-trip through the event bus, so decorative stories that need them pass `items` directly.

media-gallery.description: Grid gallery for images and media with lightbox, selection, and upload

data.description: Data array provided by the trait via render-ui

selectionEvent.description: Event name emitted when selection changes (emitted as UI:{selectionEvent})

signature-pad.description: Canvas-based signature capture pad with draw, clear, and confirm actions

document-viewer.description: Document viewer for PDFs, text, HTML, and markdown with zoom and pagination

graph-canvas.description: Force-directed graph visualization for node-link data with interactive zoom, pan, and layout

code-viewer.description: Code and diff viewer with line numbers, copy, word-wrap, and multi-file tabs

canvas-effect.description: CanvasEffect Component  Renders animated visual effects as DOM overlays on the canvas. Maps combat action types to particle/flash effects that play at a specified position and auto-dismiss.  Pattern: canvas-effect

actionType.description: The type of combat action to visualise

x.description: Screen-space X position (center of the effect)

y.description: Screen-space Y position (center of the effect)

duration.description: Duration in ms before auto-dismiss (default 2000 for canvas, 800 for emoji)

intensity.description: Optional intensity multiplier (1 = normal, 2 = double size/brightness)

onComplete.description: Callback when the effect animation completes

completeEvent.description: Declarative event: emits UI:{completeEvent} when the effect animation completes

assetBaseUrl.description: Base URL for remote assets. Prepended to relative effectSpriteUrl paths.

assetManifest.description: Full effect asset manifest for the sprite particle engine. When provided, enables the canvas-based particle system.

isometric-canvas.description: IsometricCanvas  Core isometric game renderer. Maps to the `game-canvas` pattern. Adapted from projects/trait-wars/design-system/organisms/IsometricGameCanvas.tsx with full closed-circuit pattern compliance (className, isLoading, error, entity).  Architecture: - 2:1 diamond isometric projection - Painter's algorithm (tile → feature → unit depth sort) - Camera pan/zoom with lerp - Off-screen culling - Minimap on separate canvas - Sprite sheet animation via resolveUnitFrame - Event bus–friendly handlers (onTileClick, onUnitClick, etc.)

units.description: Array of units on the board

features.description: Array of features (resources, portals, buildings, etc.)

validMoves.description: Valid move positions (shown as pulsing green highlights)

attackTargets.description: Attack target positions (shown as pulsing red highlights)

onTileClick.description: --- Event handlers (legacy callbacks — prefer declarative event string props below) ---

unitClickEvent.description: Declarative event: emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click

tileHoverEvent.description: Declarative event: emits UI:{tileHoverEvent} with { x, y } on tile hover

tileLeaveEvent.description: Declarative event: emits UI:{tileLeaveEvent} with {} on tile leave

debug.description: Show debug grid lines and coordinates

backgroundImage.description: Background image URL tiled behind the isometric grid

unitScale.description: Extra scale multiplier for unit draw size. 1 = default.

boardWidth.description: Board width in tiles (overrides tile-derived size)

boardHeight.description: Board height in tiles (overrides tile-derived size)

diamondTopY.description: Override for the diamond-top Y offset within the tile sprite (default: 374). This controls where the flat diamond face sits vertically inside the tile image.

getFeatureSprite.description: Resolve feature sprite URL from feature type key

resolveUnitFrame.description: Resolve animated sprite sheet frame for a unit

effectSpriteUrls.description: Additional sprite URLs to preload (e.g., effect sprites)

onDrawEffects.description: Callback to draw canvas effects after units (canvas-specific: cannot be declarative)

hasActiveEffects.description: Whether there are active effects — keeps RAF loop alive

assetManifest.description: Manifest mapping entity keys to relative sprite paths. Combined with assetBaseUrl to produce full URLs. Used as a fallback when inline URLs and callbacks don't resolve.

battle-template.description: BattleTemplate  Generalized tactical battle template composing IsometricCanvas from almadar-ui. Provides turn-based phase management, movement animation, valid-move/attack-target calculation, screen shake/flash, and a game-over overlay.  Game-specific UI (combat log, trait viewer, damage popups, etc.) is injected via render-prop slots so this template remains project-agnostic.

entity.description: Entity data, the sole source of runtime state

castle-template.description: CastleTemplate  Generalized castle / base-management template composing IsometricCanvas from almadar-ui. Renders an isometric courtyard/base view and exposes a side-panel area via slots for game-specific UI (building details, recruitment, garrison).

entity.description: Entity data, the sole source of runtime state

world-map-template.description: WorldMapTemplate  Generalized strategic world-map template composing IsometricCanvas from almadar-ui. Renders an isometric hex/iso map with hero selection, movement animation, and encounter callbacks. Game-specific panels (hero detail, hero lists, resource bars) are injected via render-prop slots.

entity.description: Entity data, the sole source of runtime state

diamondTopY.description: Override for the diamond-top Y offset within tile sprites (default: 374).

allowMoveAllHeroes.description: Allow selecting / moving ALL heroes (including enemy). For testing.

battle-board.description: BattleBoard  Core game-logic organism extracted from BattleTemplate. Handles turn-based phase management, movement animation, valid-move/attack-target calculation, screen shake/flash, and game-over detection.  Accepts a single `entity` prop (BattleEntity) containing all board data, plus optional render-prop slots, callback overrides, and declarative event props that emit via `useEventBus()`.

sidebar.description: Sidebar content (combat log, unit roster, etc.)

overlay.description: Floating overlays above the canvas (damage popups, tooltips)

unitClickEvent.description: Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click

endTurnEvent.description: Emits UI:{endTurnEvent} with {} on end turn

gameEndEvent.description: Emits UI:{gameEndEvent} with { result: 'victory' | 'defeat' } on game end

playAgainEvent.description: Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset

attackEvent.description: Emits UI:{attackEvent} with { attackerId, targetId, damage } on attack

castle-board.description: CastleBoard  Self-contained castle / base-management game board organism. Encapsulates all isometric canvas rendering, hover/selection state, and slot-based layout. Designed to be consumed by CastleTemplate (thin wrapper) or embedded directly in any page that needs an isometric castle view.  Accepts an `entity` prop conforming to `CastleEntity` and optional declarative event props (`featureClickEvent`, `unitClickEvent`, `tileClickEvent`) that emit through the Orbital event bus.

sidePanel.description: Side panel content (buildings list, recruit tab, garrison tab)

onUnitClick.description: Called when a unit is clicked

onTileClick.description: Called when any tile is clicked

unitClickEvent.description: Event name to emit via event bus when a unit is clicked (emits UI:{unitClickEvent})

tileClickEvent.description: Event name to emit via event bus when a tile is clicked (emits UI:{tileClickEvent})

world-map-board.description: WorldMapBoard  Organism that contains ALL game logic for the strategic world-map view. Renders an isometric hex/iso map with hero selection, movement animation, and encounter callbacks. Game-specific panels (hero detail, hero lists, resource bars) are injected via render-prop slots.  This component is the logic-heavy core; WorldMapTemplate is a thin layout wrapper that delegates to WorldMapBoard.

allowMoveAllHeroes.description: Allow selecting / moving ALL heroes (including enemy). For testing.

heroMoveEvent.description: Emits UI:{heroMoveEvent} with { heroId, toX, toY }

featureEnterEvent.description: Emits UI:{featureEnterEvent} with { heroId, feature, hex }

sidePanel.description: Side panel (hero detail, hero lists, etc.)

onBattleEncounter.description: Called when hero clicks an enemy hero tile

onFeatureEnter.description: Called when hero enters a feature hex (castle, resource, etc.)

enableCamera.description: Disable pan/zoom camera (default: true). Set false for fixed maps where overlay labels need stable positions.

collapsible-section.description: Shared Map Editor Utilities  Reusable editor components for Storybook-based map editing. All composed from @almadar/ui atoms (Box, VStack, HStack, Typography, Button, Badge).  NOTE: These are Storybook editor controls, NOT Orbital templates. They use native HTML inputs wrapped in Box for lightweight editor UX.

model-loader.description: ModelLoader Component  React Three Fiber component for loading and displaying GLB/GLTF models from URLs. Handles loading states and errors without requiring React Suspense.

scale.description: Scale - either a single number or [x, y, z]

resourceBasePath.description: Base path for shared resources (textures, materials). If not provided, auto-detected from the URL by looking for a `/3d/` segment. E.g. "https://host/3d/" so that "Textures/colormap.png" resolves correctly.

feature-renderer.description: FeatureRenderer  Renders static features (trees, rocks, buildings) in the 3D scene. Supports different feature types and selection states.

tile-renderer.description: TileRenderer  Renders isometric tiles using Three.js InstancedMesh for performance. Supports texture mapping and custom tile geometries.

unit-renderer.description: UnitRenderer  Renders animated units in the 3D scene. Supports skeletal animations, health bars, and selection indicators.

onAnimationStateChange.description: Called when unit animation state changes

state-indicator.description: StateIndicator Component  Displays a visual indicator for a game entity's current state. Generic — not tied to any specific game. Projects can extend the state styles via the `stateStyles` prop.

label.description: Optional label override (defaults to capitalized state name)

animated.description: Whether to show pulse animation on non-idle states

stateStyles.description: Custom state styles to extend/override defaults

children.description: Content to render when no error

fallback.description: Fallback UI when an error is caught — ReactNode or render function

className.description: Additional CSS classes for the wrapper

onError.description: Called when an error is caught (for logging/telemetry)

rows.description: Number of rows for table/text variants

columns.description: Number of columns for table variant

fields.description: Number of fields for form variant

manifest.description: Sound manifest — keys mapped to SoundEntry definitions

baseUrl.description: Base URL prepended to all sound paths (default '')

className.description: Closed-circuit props (unused, accepted for runtime compatibility)

draggable.description: Whether this slot's equipped item is draggable

onDragStart.description: Called when drag starts from this slot

feedback.description: Per-slot correctness feedback after a failed attempt

trait.description: The trait / state machine to visualize

stateStyles.description: Custom state styles passed to StateIndicator

uncontrolled-battle-board.description: UncontrolledBattleBoard  Thin wrapper that composes `useBattleState` + `BattleBoard` for self-managing game state.  Accepts `initialUnits` instead of the controlled-mode fields and manages units, phase, turn, gameResult, and selectedUnitId internally via the hook.  Use this component when you want the BattleBoard to manage its own game logic (e.g. in Storybook, prototypes, or simple integrations). For Orbital trait integration, use `BattleBoard` directly in controlled mode.

quiz-block.description: QuizBlock Molecule Component  A collapsible Q&A block for embedded quiz questions in content. Shows the question with a reveal button for the answer.  Event Contract: - No events emitted (self-contained interaction) - entityAware: false

code-block.description: CodeBlock Molecule Component  A syntax-highlighted code block with copy-to-clipboard functionality. Preserves scroll position during re-renders.  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:COPY_CODE { language, success }

foldable.description: Enable JSON-style code folding (default: true for json/orb)

editable.description: When true, render an editable surface that composes a transparent `Textarea` over a Prism-highlighted overlay. The overlay re-tokenizes on each keystroke (driven from a local mirror of the textarea value), so users see syntax-highlighted code while still being able to type. Folding is skipped in editable mode. History: GAP-51 first-cut shipped plain (no-highlighting) editable text; GAP-77 (2026-04-12) added the Prism overlay layer. Default: false (existing read-only behavior unchanged).

onChange.description: GAP-51: called with the new code on every keystroke when `editable === true`. Consumers should debounce + parse downstream — `CodeBlock` does not.

errorLines.description: GAP-80: line-level error/warning highlights for editable mode. Map of 1-based line number → severity. The overlay paints a colored background on each line: error = red, warning = yellow. Pass undefined (default) to disable. The consumer is responsible for computing the path → line map from the schema + validation results.

markdown-content.description: MarkdownContent Molecule Component  Renders markdown content with support for GFM (GitHub Flavored Markdown), math equations (KaTeX), and raw HTML. Handles inline code only — fenced code blocks should be parsed out and rendered with CodeBlock component.  Event Contract: - No events emitted (display-only component) - entityAware: false  NOTE: react-markdown's `components` override API requires native HTML elements — this is the same library-boundary exception as `<iframe>` in DocumentViewer and `<svg>` in JazariStateMachine/StateMachineView.

content-renderer.description: ContentRenderer Organism  Renders rich content as a sequence of typed segments: markdown, code, orbital diagrams (via JazariStateMachine), and quiz blocks. Accepts either raw content string (auto-parsed) or pre-parsed segments.  Event Contract: - Delegates to child components (CodeBlock -> UI:COPY_CODE) - entityAware: false

data.description: Data array provided by the trait via render-ui

content.description: Raw content string — auto-parsed into segments

schema.description: Full schema — extracts first trait's state machine

trait.description: Or pass a single trait directly

renderStateNode.description: Custom state node renderer — when provided, replaces the default circle nodes

book-chapter-view.description: BookChapterView Organism  Renders a single chapter: title + optional orbital diagram + rich content via ContentRenderer.  Event Contract: - Delegates to ContentRenderer children

book-cover-page.description: BookCoverPage Molecule  Renders a book cover with title, subtitle, author, and optional image. Centered layout suitable for the first "page" of a BookViewer.  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:BOOK_START

book-nav-bar.description: BookNavBar Molecule  Navigation bar for the BookViewer with prev/next, page indicator, print button, and TOC toggle.  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:BOOK_PAGE_PREV, UI:BOOK_PAGE_NEXT, UI:BOOK_PRINT, UI:BOOK_SHOW_TOC

book-table-of-contents.description: BookTableOfContents Molecule  Renders a clickable table of contents grouped by parts. Highlights the current chapter.  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:BOOK_NAVIGATE { chapterId }

book-viewer.description: BookViewer Organism  Flippable book reader with cover, TOC, chapter views, and navigation. Supports RTL layout (Arabic), CSS slide transitions, and print mode.  Page model: 0 = cover, 1 = TOC, 2+ = chapters (flattened from parts)  Event Contract: - Emits: UI:BOOK_PAGE_CHANGE { pageIndex, chapterId? } - Listens: UI:BOOK_START, UI:BOOK_NAVIGATE, UI:BOOK_PAGE_PREV/NEXT, UI:BOOK_PRINT, UI:BOOK_SHOW_TOC

data.description: Data array provided by the trait via render-ui

fieldMap.description: Field name translation map — a BookFieldMap object or locale key ("ar")

scaled-diagram.description: ScaledDiagram Molecule  Wraps a fixed-size diagram (like JazariStateMachine / StateMachineView) and CSS-scales it to fit the parent container width.  The diagram renders at its natural (large) size. We observe the content element and once the diagram is measured we apply transform:scale() with a corrected container height so surrounding layout flows correctly.  Event Contract: - No events emitted (layout-only wrapper) - entityAware: false

combat-log.description: CombatLog Component  Scrollable log of combat events with icons and colors. Generalized from Trait Wars — removed asset manifest coupling.

simulation-canvas.description: SimulationCanvas  Self-contained 2D physics canvas for educational presets. Runs its own Euler integration loop — no external physics hook needed.

simulation-controls.description: SimulationControls  Play/pause/step/reset controls with speed and parameter sliders.

simulation-graph.description: SimulationGraph  Real-time measurement graph for physics simulations. Renders measurement data as a simple line chart on canvas.

data.description: data prop

builder-board.description: BuilderBoard  Component-snapping game board. The player places components onto slots in a blueprint. Correct placement completes the build.  Good for: architecture, circuits, molecules, system design stories.  Events emitted via completeEvent (default UI:PUZZLE_COMPLETE).

classifier-board.description: ClassifierBoard  Drag-and-drop classification game. The player sorts items into the correct category buckets. All items must be correctly classified to win.  Good for: taxonomy, pattern recognition, sorting stories.  Events emitted via completeEvent (default UI:PUZZLE_COMPLETE).

debugger-board.description: DebuggerBoard  Error-finding game board. The player reviews a code/system listing and identifies lines or elements that contain bugs.  Good for: programming, logic, troubleshooting stories.  Events emitted via completeEvent (default UI:PUZZLE_COMPLETE).

event-handler-board.description: EventHandlerBoard Organism  Contains ALL game logic for the Event Handler tier (ages 9-12). Kids click on world objects, set WHEN/THEN rules, and watch event chains cascade during playback.  Encourages experimentation: on failure, resets to editing so the kid can try different rules. After 3 failures, shows a progressive hint.

stepDurationMs.description: Playback speed in ms per event

event-log.description: EventLog Component  Scrolling log of events during playback in the Event Handler tier. Shows the chain reaction as events cascade through objects.

object-rule-panel.description: ObjectRulePanel Component  Shows the rules panel for a selected world object in the Event Handler tier. Displays object info, its current state (via TraitStateViewer), and a list of WHEN/THEN rules the kid has set.

rule-editor.description: RuleEditor Component  A single WHEN/THEN rule row for the Event Handler tier (ages 9-12). Kid picks an event trigger and an action from dropdowns.

availableEvents.description: Available event triggers to listen for

negotiator-board.description: NegotiatorBoard  Turn-based decision matrix game. The player makes choices over multiple rounds against an AI opponent. Each round both sides pick an action, and payoffs are determined by the combination.  Good for: ethics, business, game theory, economics stories.  Events emitted via completeEvent (default UI:PUZZLE_COMPLETE).

action-palette.description: ActionPalette Component  Grid of draggable ActionTile components for the Sequencer tier. Kids pick from these to build their sequence.

usedActionIds.description: IDs of actions that are already used (shown as disabled)

allowDuplicates.description: Whether each action can be used multiple times

action-tile.description: ActionTile Component  A draggable action tile for the Sequencer tier (ages 5-8). Kids drag these from the ActionPalette into SequenceBar slots. Sets SlotItemData on dataTransfer for TraitSlot compatibility.

action.description: The action data

disabled.description: Whether the tile is disabled / already used

sequence-bar.description: SequenceBar Component  A row of TraitSlot components forming the action sequence for the Sequencer tier (ages 5-8). Kids drag ActionTiles from the palette into these slots to build their sequence.

slots.description: The current sequence (sparse — undefined means empty slot)

onSlotDrop.description: Called when an item is dropped into slot at index

onSlotRemove.description: Called when a slot is cleared

playing.description: Whether the sequence is currently playing (disable interaction)

currentStep.description: Current step index during playback (-1 = not playing)

slotFeedback.description: Per-slot correctness feedback shown after a failed attempt

sequencer-board.description: SequencerBoard Organism  Contains ALL game logic for the Sequencer tier (ages 5-8). Manages the action sequence, validates it, and animates Kekec executing each step on the puzzle scene.  Feedback-first UX: - On failure: slots stay in place, each slot gets a green or red ring showing exactly which steps are correct and which need to change. - Modifying a slot clears its individual feedback so the kid can re-try. - After 3 failures a persistent hint appears above the sequence bar. - "Reset" clears everything including attempts / hint.  TraitStateViewer states use indexed labels ("1. Walk", "2. Jump") so that repeated actions are correctly highlighted during playback.

stepDurationMs.description: Playback speed in ms per step

simulator-board.description: SimulatorBoard  Parameter-slider game board. The player adjusts parameters and observes real-time output. Correct parameter values must bring the output within a target range to win.  Good for: physics, economics, system design stories.  Events emitted via completeEvent (default UI:PUZZLE_COMPLETE).

code-view.description: CodeView Component  Shows the JSON code representation of a state machine. Toggle between visual and code view in State Architect tier.

data.description: JSON data to display

defaultExpanded.description: Whether the code is expanded by default

state-architect-board.description: StateArchitectBoard Organism  Contains ALL game logic for the State Architect tier (ages 13+). Kids design state machines via a visual graph editor, then run them to see if the behavior matches the puzzle goal.

state-node.description: StateNode Component  A draggable state circle for the graph editor in the State Architect tier (ages 13+). Shows state name, highlights when current, and supports click to select.

isCurrent.description: Whether this is the current active state

isSelected.description: Whether this node is selected for editing

isInitial.description: Whether this is the initial state

transition-arrow.description: TransitionArrow Component  An SVG arrow connecting two state nodes in the graph editor. Shows the event name as a label on the arrow.

eventLabel.description: Event label shown on the arrow

isActive.description: Whether this transition is currently active

className.description: Additional CSS classes for the SVG group

variable-panel.description: VariablePanel Component  Shows entity variables and their current values during State Architect playback.

onClick.description: Called when the day is clicked

className.description: Optional className for the outer wrapper

children.description: The two face elements (front and back)

onClick.description: Click handler on the outer wrapper
Called when the slot is clicked

children.description: Event content placed inside the slot

isOccupied.description: Whether this slot contains an event

weekStart.description: Start of the week (defaults to current week's Monday)

events.description: Events to display on the grid

onSlotClick.description: Called when a time slot is clicked

onDayClick.description: Called when a day header is clicked

onEventClick.description: Called when an event is clicked

longPressEvent.description: Event emitted on long-press of a time slot: UI:{longPressEvent} with { date, time, ...longPressPayload }

swipeLeftEvent.description: Event emitted on swipe left (next week): UI:{swipeLeftEvent}

swipeRightEvent.description: Event emitted on swipe right (prev week): UI:{swipeRightEvent}

items.description: Legend items with label and color

onSelect.description: Callback when a range is selected

front.description: Content rendered on the front face

back.description: Content rendered on the back face

onFlip.description: Callback when the card is clicked to flip

className.description: Optional className for the outer container

height.description: Card height as a Tailwind class (default: 'h-64')

onNodeClick.description: Callback when a node is clicked

onNodeHover.description: Callback when a node is hovered (null on leave)

zoomToFit.description: Auto zoom-to-fit after layout settles (default true)

data.description: Data points to plot

showValues.description: Show value labels near data points

showArea.description: Fill area under line with gradient

getState.description: Custom state resolver per dot index

onDotClick.description: Callback when a dot is clicked

entity.description: Schema entity data — single record or collection, typed against `@almadar/core`'s `EntityRow` so the narrow type declared on the emitting trait's `Event { data : [X] }` flows through to the prop without widening. The generic `T` lets consumers pass a narrower entity (e.g. `CartItem`) and have the `children` render function receive cards typed to that exact shape.

fields.description: Field definitions for rendering each card

cols.description: Number of columns (uses auto-fit if omitted)

minCardWidth.description: Minimum card width in pixels (used when cols is not set, default 280)

imageField.description: Entity field name containing an image URL for card thumbnails

selectionEvent.description: Selection change event name (emits UI:{selectionEvent} with { selectedIds: string[] })

loadMoreEvent.description: Event emitted when more items needed: UI:{loadMoreEvent}

hasMore.description: Whether more items are available for infinite scroll

children.description: Render prop for custom per-card content, typed to the grid's entity shape `T`. When provided, `fields` and `itemActions` are ignored.

renderItem.description: Per-item render function (schema-level alias for children render prop). In .orb schemas: ["fn", "item", { pattern tree with @item.field bindings }] The compiler converts this to the children render prop. @deprecated Use children render prop in React code. This prop exists for pattern registry sync.

pageSize.description: Max items to show before "Show More" button. Defaults to 0 (disabled).

entity.description: Schema entity data — single record or collection, typed against `@almadar/core`'s `EntityRow` so the narrow type declared on the emitting trait's `Event { data : [X] }` flows through to the prop without widening. The generic `T` lets consumers pass a narrower entity (e.g. `CartItem`) and have the `children` render function receive items of that exact shape.

fields.description: Field definitions for rendering each row

groupBy.description: Group items by a field value (renders section headers between groups)

senderField.description: Field name identifying the sender (used with variant: "message")

currentUser.description: Current user identifier; messages matching this value align right (used with variant: "message")

reorderEvent.description: Event emitted on reorder: UI:{reorderEvent} with { fromIndex, toIndex }

swipeLeftEvent.description: Event emitted on left swipe: UI:{swipeLeftEvent} with { row }

swipeRightEvent.description: Event emitted on right swipe: UI:{swipeRightEvent} with { row }

longPressEvent.description: Event emitted on long press: UI:{longPressEvent} with { row }

loadMoreEvent.description: Event emitted when more items needed: UI:{loadMoreEvent}

hasMore.description: Whether more items are available for infinite scroll

children.description: Render prop for custom per-item content. When provided, `fields` and `itemActions` are ignored.

renderItem.description: Per-item render function (schema-level alias for children render prop). In .orb schemas: ["fn", "item", { pattern tree with @item.field bindings }] The compiler converts this to the children render prop. @deprecated Use children render prop in React code. This prop exists for pattern registry sync.

pageSize.description: Max items to show before "Show More" button. Defaults to 5. Set to 0 to disable.

tileSprites.description: Map of platform type to tile sprite URL

assetBaseUrl.description: Base URL prefix for asset URLs

onMarkerClick.description: Callback when a marker is clicked (programmatic use)

onMapClick.description: Callback when the map is clicked (programmatic use)

mapClickEvent.description: Event name dispatched via event bus when the map is clicked. Payload: { latitude, longitude }

markerClickEvent.description: Event name dispatched via event bus when a marker is clicked. Payload: full MapMarkerData spread.

showClickedPin.description: Whether to show a pin at the clicked location

showTooltip.description: Show tooltip with current value on drag

showTicks.description: Show tick marks at step intervals

buffered.description: Buffered range (0-100), for media seek bars

action.description: Declarative event name for value changes

actionPayload.description: Payload to include with the action event

pulse.description: Enable pulse animation for active/critical states

direction.description: Override automatic direction detection (positive=up, negative=down, zero=flat)

showValue.description: Show the formatted value text next to the arrow

invert.description: Invert color logic (for metrics where down is good, e.g., error rate, bounce rate)

action.description: Declarative event name for value changes

actionPayload.description: Payload to include with the action event

action.description: Declarative event name for rating changes

actionPayload.description: Payload to include with the action event

action.description: Declarative event name for file selection

actionPayload.description: Payload to include with the action event

value.description: The target value to animate to. Strings are parsed numerically (e.g. "500", "99.9").

prefix.description: Text to display before the number

suffix.description: Text to display after the number

trigger.description: When this changes from false to true, a burst of particles is spawned

duration.description: How long the animation lasts in milliseconds

loadMoreEvent.description: Event name to emit when load-more is triggered (emitted as UI:{loadMoreEvent})

loadMorePayload.description: Optional payload to include with the load-more event

isLoading.description: Whether a load operation is currently in progress

hasMore.description: Whether there are more items to load

onComplete.description: Called when the entire text has been revealed

items.description: Array of items to display as slides

slideChangeEvent.description: Declarative event name for slide change

slideChangePayload.description: Payload to include with the slide change event

refreshEvent.description: Event name to emit on refresh (emitted as UI:{refreshEvent})

refreshPayload.description: Payload to include with the refresh event

threshold.description: Pull distance threshold to trigger refresh in px (default: 60)

max.description: Optional denominator. >0 renders "value / max"; 0 or omitted hides the divider.

target.description: Optional progress target. >0 renders a progress bar at value/target.

trend.description: Signed delta vs previous period. >0 renders ↑ green, <0 renders ↓ red, 0 hides.

prefix.description: Prefix prepended to the formatted value (e.g. "≈ ").

suffix.description: Suffix appended to the formatted value (e.g. " /mo", " ms").

icon.description: Lucide icon name or React node

hotkey.description: Keyboard hotkey to display as a badge

selected.description: Whether the choice is currently selected

speaker.description: Speaker name displayed at the top

portrait.description: URL for the speaker portrait image

position.description: Position of the bubble on screen

tiles.description: Tile data: each tile renders as a 1px dot at (x,y) with the given color

units.description: Unit positions: each unit renders as a 2px dot

icon.description: Icon to display for the effect

lowThreshold.description: Seconds below which to pulse red

icon.description: Custom icon to render inside the marker

active.description: Whether this waypoint is currently active

completed.description: Whether this waypoint has been completed

output.description: Output item produced by the recipe

canCraft.description: Whether the player has enough ingredients to craft

onCraft.description: Callback when the craft button is clicked

craftEvent.description: Event bus event name for crafting

effects.description: Active status effects displayed as small badges

showNumbers.description: Whether to display numeric HP values

items.description: Array of items to display in the grid

columns.description: Number of columns in the grid

totalSlots.description: Total number of slots (empty slots fill remaining space)

onSelect.description: Callback when an item is selected

selectEvent.description: Event bus event name for selection

size.description: Size variant for all item slots

activeQuestId.description: ID of the currently active quest

selectedUnitId.description: ID of the currently selected unit

showBackground.description: V2: Render a category-colored background circle behind the icon.

angle.description: Angle in radians from entity center.

role.description: V2: Role-based fill color. When set, overrides monochrome rendering.

transitionCount.description: V2: Number of transitions touching this state. Drives proportional width.

curveAwayFrom.description: Center point to curve away from (curves outward if provided).

description.description: Short description of the case study

category.description: Category label shown as a badge

categoryColor.description: Custom background color for the category badge (CSS value)

title.description: Optional title shown in the header bar

copyable.description: Whether to show a copy button

maxHeight.description: Maximum height of the code area (CSS value)

items.description: Breadcrumb path items, last item is treated as current page

title.description: Optional title/filename shown in the header bar

showLineNumbers.description: Show line numbers in the gutter

onSearch.description: Callback invoked with the search query, returns results

size.description: Card size affecting icon and spacing

color.description: Override the center color (CSS value). Defaults to var(--color-primary).

backgroundElement.description: Background element (SVG animation, etc.) rendered behind hero content

command.description: The command to display and copy

action.description: action prop

data.description: Data array provided by the trait via render-ui
Data array provided by the trait via render-ui

children.description: Children (the AVL atoms to render on top)

schema.description: The orbital schema (parsed object or JSON string)

className.description: CSS class for the outer container

focusTarget.description: Dynamic focus target. Changes animate the zoom to the specified orbital/trait.

data prop

about-page-template.description: AboutPageTemplate  An about/company page template with hero, articles, team grid, case studies, and CTA. Pure function: no hooks, no callbacks, no local state.

entity.description: Entity data, the sole source of runtime state

feature-detail-page-template.description: FeatureDetailPageTemplate  A feature detail page with hero, alternating split sections, and CTA. Pure function: no hooks, no callbacks, no local state.

src.description: URL to an SVG file. Fetched and inlined to enable stroke/fill animations.

svgContent.description: Inline SVG string. Takes precedence over src if both provided.

animation.description: Animation type applied to SVG paths/shapes

animate.description: Whether to run the animation (default: false). Controlled externally or via AnimatedReveal.

delay.description: Delay before animation starts in ms (default: 0)

strokeColor.description: Stroke color override for SVG paths

fillColor.description: Fill color for the 'fill' animation end state

delay.description: Delay before animation starts in ms (default: 0)

threshold.description: How much of the element must be visible before triggering, 0-1 (default: 0.15)

once.description: Animate only the first time the element enters the viewport (default: true)

animate.description: Manual control: when trigger='manual', set this to true to animate

children.description: Children: ReactNode or render function receiving animated state

size.description: Tile unit size in SVG units

side.description: Which side(s) to place the decoration

width.description: Width of the decoration area as percentage of container (default: 15)

children.description: Content to wrap (used in frame mode)

effectTypes.description: Effect types used (drives markers on rings)

onOrbitalDoubleClick.description: GAP-52: fired when the user double-clicks an orbital. Consumers (e.g. the builder workspace) use this as the trigger to enter cosmic mode (`AvlOrbitalsCosmicZoom`) for the focused orbital. The level at which this fires is controlled by `cosmicEntryLevel` (default `'expanded'`). At `'expanded'` the existing overview→expanded drill is preserved — the callback fires only on the second double-click. At `'overview'` the callback fires on the FIRST double-click and the existing drill is suppressed for that interaction. `'both'` fires at either level. The callback runs unconditionally — persona / permission gating is the consumer's responsibility.

cosmicEntryLevel.description: GAP-53: which level the `onOrbitalDoubleClick` callback fires at. - `'expanded'` (default, non-breaking) — fires only at L2 expanded; the first overview double-click still drills overview→expanded. - `'overview'` — fires at L1 overview on the FIRST double-click. The overview→expanded drill is suppressed when the callback is provided. - `'both'` — fires at either level.

initialLevel.description: Start at Level 2 (expanded) when initialOrbital is set. Default: 'overview'.

initialSelectedNode.description: Pre-select a node on mount (opens OrbInspector).

editable.description: Enable editing in the inspector. When true, fields become inputs.

onSchemaChange.description: Called when the user edits the schema via the inspector.

onPatternDelete.description: Called when the user presses Delete/Backspace with a pattern selected.

onEventWire.description: Called when the user drags from a source handle to a target handle (event wiring).

behaviorMeta.description: Behavior layer metadata for node styling (layer color bands).

layoutHint.description: Layout hint: 'pipeline' renders nodes left-to-right, 'grid' (default) uses sqrt-based grid.

onNodeSelect.description: Called when the user clicks a node in overview level (for composition hints).

composeLevel.description: When 'behavior', shows behavior-level glyph nodes instead of orbital previews.

behaviorEntries.description: Behavior entries for compose mode (only when composeLevel='behavior').

behaviorWires.description: Event wires between behaviors (only when composeLevel='behavior').

onZoomChange.description: @deprecated Use onNodeClick instead. Kept for AvlCosmicZoom compat.

occlude.description: Hide label when behind other objects

accentColor.description: Optional accent color for the left border

showLabel.description: Whether to show the XP label

fields.description: Field type strings for V5 shape encoding (optional, falls back to spheres)

traitCount.description: Number of traits (affects ring size and scale)

isInitial.description: Whether this is the initial state

isTerminal.description: Whether this is a terminal state

active.description: Whether this state is currently active

hasGuard.description: Whether this transition has a guard

effectTypes.description: Effect type names for V4 micro-icons

onDraw.description: Called each frame with the 2D context and current frame count

onTick.description: Called each tick with delta time in seconds

hudMode.description: HUD positioning mode: 'fixed' (default, viewport-relative) or 'inline' (container-relative, uses sticky)

className.description: Additional class name for the container

suspense.description: Enable Suspense boundaries around each slot. When true, each inline slot is wrapped in `<ErrorBoundary><Suspense>` with Skeleton fallbacks. Opt-in — existing isLoading prop pattern still works.

Page: Battle3DPage Entity: Battle3D ViewType: detail  Events Emitted: - TILE_SELECTED - When a tile is clicked - UNIT_SELECTED - When a unit is clicked - UNIT_ATTACK - When attacking a unit - UNIT_MOVE - When moving a unit - END_TURN - When ending turn - EXIT_BATTLE - When exiting battle

game-canvas-3d-world-map-template.description: GameCanvas3DWorldMapTemplate  Pure declarative template wrapper for 3D world map. No hooks, no callbacks, no local state -- just entity data and config props.  Page: WorldMap3DPage Entity: WorldMap3D ViewType: detail  Events Emitted: - TILE_SELECTED - When a tile is clicked ({ tileId, x, z, type }) - UNIT_SELECTED - When a unit is clicked ({ unitId, x, z, name }) - FEATURE_SELECTED - When a feature is clicked ({ featureId, x, z, type }) - TILE_HOVERED - When hovering over a tile ({ tileId, x, z }) - TILE_LEAVE - When leaving a tile ({}) - CAMERA_CHANGED - When camera position changes ({ position })

entity.description: Entity data, the sole source of runtime state

validMoves.description: Valid move positions for selected unit

trait-frame.description: TraitFrame — renders the current frame of a referenced trait.  Resolves the `@trait.X[.slot]` binding at render time by looking up the referenced trait's last `render-ui` payload from the orbital's `UISlotManager`. Re-renders automatically when that trait transitions via the per-trait subscription channel (`subscribeTrait`).  This is the single rendering primitive both runtime paths converge on:  - **Interpreted path** — the trait-binding resolver in `renderer/trait-binding-resolver.ts` walks pattern trees at render time, substituting `"@trait.X"` string children with this component. - **Compiled path** — the TypeScript shell codegen in `orbital-shell-typescript/src/backend.rs::pattern_to_jsx_with_data` emits this component directly into generated JSX wherever a `@trait.*` string appears in a pattern tree.  Embedding is passive: the referenced trait's state machine runs unchanged; TraitFrame is only a read-only lens on its current frame. Event propagation happens over the shared event bus, not through this component.

traitName.description: Name of the trait whose current frame to embed. Must match a trait declared in the current orbital. Compiler validates that the name exists at build time (see `ORB_BINDING_TRAIT_UNKNOWN`).

fallback.description: Rendered when the referenced trait has not (yet) emitted any render-ui. Use a skeleton, spinner, or message. Defaults to `null` (renders nothing), so an unfulfilled reference drops cleanly out of a parent `children:` array.

onFileSelect.description: Called when a file is clicked

indent.description: Indent size per level in px (default: 16)

schema.description: The orbital schema (parsed object or JSON string)

className.description: CSS class for the outer container

highlightedOrbital.description: GAP-52: name of the orbital to highlight with a persistent ring/glow. Independent from user-driven selection (click). Used by the builder workspace when entering cosmic mode from a focused orbital — the focused orbital is highlighted while the user can still click any other orbital to select it.

onOrbitalSelect.description: GAP-55: fired when the user clicks an orbital tile. Consumers (e.g. the builder workspace) use this as the trigger to drill INTO the clicked orbital — typically by switching back to the canvas tab and opening the clicked orbital at L2 expanded. Local `selected` toggle (visual highlight + info panel) still fires regardless of whether the callback is provided.

minZoom.description: GAP-54: minimum zoom factor when scroll-wheel zooming. Default 0.4.

maxZoom.description: GAP-54: maximum zoom factor when scroll-wheel zooming. Default 3.
